Description: Restore a saved brush config snapshot
Title: Load Brush Config Snapshot

Options.Description: The name of the brush config snapshot to load
Options.Label: Stored Name

Options.Description:
The parameters of the brush config snapshot to load. The possible parameters to load from the snapshot are:

Offset
Dimensions
Thickness
Capped
Pattern
BrushMask
OperationMask
HistoryMask
Options.Label: Parameters To Load
